transcription.text: There's no place like home for the holidays and no place like the Jeep Wrap Up the Year sales event for great deals on the most capable Wrangler ever or the most luxurious vehicle in its class, the Grand Cherokee from the most awarded SUV brand. Hurry in today and wrap up the year with no monthly payments for 90 days. Jeep, there's only one. Or well-qualified current FCA employee lessees can lease select 2025 Jeep Grand Cherokee models and dealer stock for $280 a month with $280 due at signing and zero down payment. See your Metro Detroit Jeep brand dealers.

metadata.title: 2025 Jeep Wrap Up the Year Sales Event Black Friday: No Place Like Home [T2]
